title: Mesozoic Empire
description: A trip to the past adding extinct creatures
body:
# READ :
This alpha is not designed to be played in survival mode, it is incomplete and has bugs.
This mod inspired by **Ancient Nature and The Dawn Era** will bring a variety of extinct prehistoric creatures upon completion. It should also be said that probably **(95%)** it will not have more content than what was agreed on our **Discord server** (8-9 Creatures)

## **Current Content :**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**- Creatures** :

Dimetrodon.

**- Items/tools** :

Dimetrodon Armour, Dimetrodon Spawnegg.

**- Blocks** :
Wattieza Log, Wattieza Wood, Wattieza Stripped Log, Wattieza Stripped Wood, Wattieza Planks, Wattieza Stairs, Wattieza Slabs, Wattieza Fence, Wattieza Fence Gate, Wattieza Door, Wattieza Trapdoor, Wattieza Pressure Plate, Wattieza Button, Wattieza Branch.

</details>

### Credits :
- **Omega** : Creator, coder, modeler, texturizer and animator.
- **Duoud** : Modeler and texturizer.
- **Naunt** : Donor of the Meganeura and Dimetrodon model.
- **Pankeko** : Concept artist of Shonisaurus and texturizer of adult Dimetrodon.
- **El Gaviota** : Adult Dimetrodon Modeler.
- **Luisc4dxd** : Donor of the Tarchia model and texture.

### Honorable mentions :
- **Reaper** : Creator of Ancient Nature
- **X1sh** : Creator of The Dawn Era
- **Zeus** : Cool dude and admin on the **Discord server**
- **PerroZaurio** : Gave the color tone for the Wattieza wood


**JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER TO LEARN MORE ABOUT THIS MOD AND FUTURE UPDATES**
